name: everyone-communicates-few-connect
description: John C. Maxwell's Everyone Communicates, Few Connect — apply the 5 principles and 5 practices of connecting to move from merely sending information to genuinely connecting with people
useCase: Helps leaders, speakers, and anyone who communicates shift from information delivery to genuine connection — finding common ground, simplifying messages, adding energy, and building lasting relationships.
knownRisks: Connection is context-dependent — techniques that work in one setting may not work in another
